title: Restrepiella ophiocephala
taxonomy: Restrepiella ophiocephala is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Restrepiella. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. Restrepiella ophiocephala is also classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants, such as trees, without deriving nutrients from them. This species is native to Central and South America, where it is typically found in humid, tropical environments. At the kingdom level, Restrepiella ophiocephala is classified as Plantae, which is the most general classification for plants.
